headline: Investors Are Fleeing Private Credit. What the Funds Should Do Now.
summary: Private credit was initially an investment mainly for institutions. Then the industry made a big bet on retail investors.

raw.headline: Investors Are Fleeing Private Credit. What the Funds Should Do Now.
raw.summary: Private credit was initially an investment mainly for institutions. Then the industry made a big bet on retail investors.

headline: How Keeping Private Credit Safe Became Iowa’s Problem
summary: A trillion dollars worth of Americans’ life insurance money is in private debt deals. State regulators say they are on top of it.
